chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2228 of 2021 Rizaullah Versus The Secretary, Ministry of Foreign & Affair, Govt. of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.10.2024 Mr. Qaim Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G. Mr. Amin Ahmed, Assistant Director, Passports..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this matter is covered by an earlier pronouncement made in C.P. No.D- 2270/2021 and other petitions and it may apply to this case mutatis mutandis. Both learned counsel including learned D.A.G have no objection. The subject order/judgment is applicable mutatis mutandis to this case. The petition stands disposed of accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
